description: Total 14B includes all-credits (lead + featured). Lead streams ~10.6B, featured ~4.2B. The 14B figure reflects her total Spotify presence including features on tracks by other artists.
recommendedAction: Use all-credits total (14B) as it reflects total catalog impact.

description: Total 71.1M represents solo/lead work only. Combined with Eurythmics work his total Spotify presence exceeds 2.9B. Solo catalog is small compared to Eurythmics legacy.
recommendedAction: Use solo/lead figure (71.1M) unless Eurythmics work should be included.

description: 5B represents all-credits streams. Lead streams ~4B. The difference is due to production credits and features on tracks by other artists.
recommendedAction: Use all-credits total (5B) as it reflects total catalog impact.

description: 29.9B represents lead streams. All-credits streams exceed 53B. Future is frequently featured on tracks by other artists, inflating all-credits numbers significantly.
recommendedAction: Use lead streams (29.9B) for consistency unless all-credits is preferred.

description: Solo catalog ~500K streams. However, Justin Gray has 8B+ career streams from collaborations with major artists (Mariah Carey, Avril Lavigne). Solo work represents a tiny fraction of total output.
recommendedAction: Note that solo catalog (~500K) is separate from extensive career collaboration streams (8B+).

description: No aggregate stream count available on Kworb or ChartMasters. Total ~8M estimated from visible track data (~30 tracks across 3 albums). Top track Frontier at 1.75M.
recommendedAction: Use estimated total (~8M) with low confidence. Actual may differ.

description: Songstats reports 3.16M total streams but individual track stream counts require subscription. Top track TERRAIN identified but stream count not available without premium access.
recommendedAction: Use estimated top track stream count or mark as unavailable.
